Package com.rays.common

Class ORSResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.ORSResponse
  • public class ORSResponse
extends java.lang.Object
    ORSResponse class represents the standard response object for API endpoints. This class encapsulates the response data, status, and messages to be sent back to the client. It provides methods to add different types of response data including validation errors, success messages, and custom data objects.
    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static java.lang.String DATA
      Constant key for response data.
      static java.lang.String INPUT_ERROR
      Constant key for input validation errors.
      static java.lang.String MESSAGE
      Constant key for response messages.
      boolean success
      Flag indicating whether the operation was successful.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      ORSResponse()
      Default constructor.
      ORSResponse​(boolean success)
      Constructs an ORSResponse with the specified success flag.
      ORSResponse​(boolean success, java.lang.String message)
      Constructs an ORSResponse with success flag and a message.
      ORSResponse​(boolean success, java.lang.String message, java.lang.Object value)
      Constructs an ORSResponse with success flag, message, and data.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addData​(java.lang.Object value)
      Adds data to the response.
      void addInputError​(java.lang.Object value)
      Adds input validation error to the response.
      void addMessage​(java.lang.Object value)
      Adds a message to the response.
      void addResult​(java.lang.String key, java.lang.Object value)
      Adds a custom key-value pair to the response result.
      java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Object> getResult()
      Gets the result map containing all response data.
      boolean isSuccess()
      Gets the success status of the operation.
      void setResult​(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Object> result)
      Sets the result map.
      void setSuccess​(boolean success)
      Sets the success status of the operation.

    • Field Detail

      • INPUT_ERROR

        public static final java.lang.String INPUT_ERROR
        Constant key for input validation errors.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • MESSAGE

        public static final java.lang.String MESSAGE
        Constant key for response messages.

      • DATA

        public static final java.lang.String DATA
        Constant key for response data.

      • success

        public boolean success
        Flag indicating whether the operation was successful.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ORSResponse

        public ORSResponse()
        Default constructor. Creates an empty ORSResponse with success flag set to false.

      • ORSResponse

        public ORSResponse​(boolean success)
        Constructs an ORSResponse with the specified success flag.
        Parameters:
        success - the success status of the operation

      • ORSResponse

        public ORSResponse​(boolean success,
                   java.lang.String message)
        Constructs an ORSResponse with success flag and a message.
        Parameters:
        success - the success status of the operation
        message - the message to be added to the response

      • ORSResponse

        public ORSResponse​(boolean success,
                   java.lang.String message,
                   java.lang.Object value)
        Constructs an ORSResponse with success flag, message, and data.
        Parameters:
        success - the success status of the operation
        message - the message to be added to the response
        value - the data value to be added to the response

    • Method Detail

      • isSuccess

        public boolean isSuccess()
        Gets the success status of the operation.
        Returns:
        true if the operation was successful, false otherwise

      • setSuccess

        public void setSuccess​(boolean success)
        Sets the success status of the operation.
        Parameters:
        success - the success status to set

      • getResult

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Object> getResult()
        Gets the result map containing all response data.
        Returns:
        the result map

      • setResult

        public void setResult​(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.Object> result)
        Sets the result map.
        Parameters:
        result - the result map to set

      • addInputError

        public void addInputError​(java.lang.Object value)
        Adds input validation error to the response. The errors are stored under the INPUT_ERROR key.
        Parameters:
        value - the validation error object to add

      • addMessage

        public void addMessage​(java.lang.Object value)
        Adds a message to the response. The message is stored under the MESSAGE key.
        Parameters:
        value - the message object to add

      • addData

        public void addData​(java.lang.Object value)
        Adds data to the response. The data is stored under the DATA key.
        Parameters:
        value - the data object to add

      • addResult

        public void addResult​(java.lang.String key,
                      java.lang.Object value)
        Adds a custom key-value pair to the response result.
        Parameters:
        key - the key for the custom data
        value - the value for the custom data
